title: Trump Removes Sanctions on Russia to Help Oil Flow Amid Iran Conflict
summary_full: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said it was “unfortunate” that the move could benefit Russia, but maintained that it was only for the short term.
summary_public: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said it was “unfortunate” that the move could benefit Russia, but maintained that it was only for the short term.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Trump Removes Sanctions on Russia to Help Oil Flow
